meta.derived_from: 2026-07 QA calibration: 62 events (Jan 2026, pe60 catalogue) vs F-net reference-MT forward models; channel names are PHYSICAL (receiver Z/E/N; h5 keys Z/1/2)
meta.note: DEPLOYMENT-SPECIFIC channel states - re-derive per network/period with the calibration protocol (seismo-sbi .claude/runs/personal-page/testing-and-inference-prep/artifacts/qa_calibration/FINDINGS.md). Criterion: gate-dropped in >=30% of the 62 events, eyeball-confirmed.

evidence.KSN Z: sigma flips flatline (~3e-10) <-> ~83x network median; no coherent arrival either way (59/62 events dropped)
evidence.KSN E: no arrival where predicted (19/62; sits at the persistence margin)
evidence.YMZ Z: sigma ~1400x network median; instrument transients only (60/62)
evidence.KIS E: flatlined sensor: sigma ~8.8e-10 (~1/30 network median) AND event-window amplitude ~1/150 of prediction, xcorr ~0 (54/62)
evidence.SBR Z: coherent RESPONSE/GAIN error: xcorr ~0.45-0.72 but obs ~0.1-0.15x prediction on Z only, sigma also ~5x low (gain scales noise AND signal; E/N normal). Check F-net station metadata. (26/62)
evidence.ABU Z: dead in 6/6 June-2026 inspection record sections (synthetic predicts clean surface wave, obs flat). Was watch-listed at 5/62 glitch days in the Jan calibration; degraded to persistent - promoted 2026-07-11 (live-store inspection gallery).

watch_list_not_blocked.ABU E: intermittently bad (9/62): dead days + noise bursts; below persistence bar
watch_list_not_blocked.GJM Z / IMG E / ISI E: occasional glitch days (5/62 each) - per-event gates handle them
